subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 141026452 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 436013492 / 141026452
at 10:51:29.92 UT on the 26th of October 2014, initially classified as
a GRB, is in fact due to a X2.0 solar flare."
